title: Project Sam: AI-Powered Roblox NPC Conversations via MiMo-V2-Flash

targets.title: GitHub - serenemm/ProjectSam: Sam is a Roblox AI powered by a cloud-hosted large language model (MiMo v2 Flash from OpenRouter), enabling dynamic, natural language interactions. The backend is hosted on Railway and communicates with Roblox
